## Summary

- describe the change
- call out any bug fix or refactor scope

## Guardrails

- [ ] No business logic change unless explicitly intended and documented
- [ ] No logo edits or logo repositioning
- [ ] No unplanned layout shifts
- [ ] No new undocumented `.select("*")` usage

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Notes

- risk, rollout, or follow-up items
